summary: Great audience recording of a sun‑splashed Ventura show with a killer first set (Truckin’, Tennessee Jed) and a fiery Playin’ > China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider sequence, though the second half loses some steam.
review: The tape captures an exhilarating California beach gig – the first set bursts with energy, highlighted by a soaring Truckin' and a tight Tennessee Jed, while the second set opens with a superb Playin'>China Cat Sunflower>I Know You Rider jam. The audience‑sourced recording is clear enough to enjoy the nuances, but the show’s momentum tapers in the later part of the second set.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (8/10) give 4‑5 stars and praise both performance and sound; only one low rating focuses on performance issues, while the audio is consistently described as good.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call it a "wonderful sounding AUD" or "very good recording"; no major drop‑outs or distortion are mentioned.

standout_songs: Playin' > China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is tight and high‑energy, ending with a killer Truckin'; the second set starts strong with the Playin' jam but gradually loses steam toward its end.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for nuanced chord soloing in Rider and great work on The Wheel; generally highlighted as solid throughout.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mixed – some reviewers feel his playing becomes oddly dissonant and over‑playing later in the show.
band_member_comments.Bob: Noted for a raspy vocal tone and different vocal approaches on the Reprise and Around.
